subject: fix(ui): add mobile bottom spacing for sidebar and safe area
body:
On mobile, the sidebar appears at the bottom due to flex-col-reverse.
The previous p-4 padding left content flush with the screen edge,
especially uncomfortable on phones with gesture bars. Added pb-24 on
mobile (resets to pb-5 on desktop) and safe-area-inset-bottom on the
root container for notched devices.

Tags: ui, mobile, spacing
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
